news.author: Ananya Gairola
news.headline: Mark Zuckerberg Once Predicted That This Technology Would Replace Your Phone — A Decade Later, How Far Is Meta From Delivering On A 'More Natural' Future
news.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's 2015 prediction that virtual and augmented reality would replace mobile phones as the dominant computing platform faces challenges, as Meta's significant investments in immersive technologies like the Meta Quest and Ray-Ban smart glasses have yet to deliver a fully "natural" user experience, with the company continuing to struggle with losses in its Reality Labs division.

news.author: Shivdeep Dhaliwal
news.headline: Cathie Wood's Monday Moves: Loads Up On AMD Stock, Lightens Coinbase Crypto Bet
news.summary: On Monday, Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest executed significant portfolio adjustments, prominently acquiring shares of Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) while reducing positions in Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN
